strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Strong track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Deep expertise in scalable systems, cloud platforms (AWS), and containerization (Kubernetes/Docker)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework in the job description
Minimal mention of Vitest (testing framework) in recent roles, despite proficiency in testing
No clear evidence of recent work with Kotlin/Java, secondary stack requirements
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack engineering skills with a strong focus on scalable, testable solutions and AI-driven tooling. While his recent experience aligns well with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), gaps exist with Nest.js and Kotlin/Java. His leadership in open-source projects and contributions to high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency microservices) underscore his architectural depth and problem-solving capabilities.
